meta.phase-name: Model Schema Popup and Kael Context

phase-summary.outcome: Added a dedicated Model Schema popup and surfaced the active Kael model in both the builder panel and popup header.

file.description: Added model-schema popup trigger and modal, inferred Kael model id, active model selection state, and detailed model feature-reference view.
Added task `44-10` trace for model schema visibility pass.

tests.test: `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` still fails due pre-existing unrelated errors in `app/dungeonbreak-content-app/dungeon-explorer/page.tsx`.

next.action: If needed, wire explicit player-model selection to runtime projection path instead of inferred schema display only.
